attributes.description: Alerts when `etcd_server_proposals_failed_total` increases. Failed Raft proposals indicate lost quorum or severe network issues.
attributes.name: [etcd OTel] Proposal failures

investigation_guide.blob:
## etcd proposal failures

### What fired
Counter `etcd_server_proposals_failed_total` increased during the window.

### Why it matters
Proposals fail when the cluster cannot replicate the change — usually because quorum is unreachable or the leader stepped down mid-proposal. Client writes for failed proposals return errors.

### Triage
1. Check `has_leader` and leader change counters.
2. Inspect peer connectivity and disk latency.

### Remediation
- Restore quorum.
- Stabilise disk and network.

### Tuning
- Fires on any increase.

esqlQuery.esql:
TS metrics-etcd.otel-default*
// Counter: failed Raft proposals indicate lost quorum or severe network issues
| WHERE etcd_server_proposals_failed_total IS NOT NULL
// INCREASE: any increase in the window indicates failures
| STATS increase = SUM(INCREASE(etcd_server_proposals_failed_total))
    BY resource.attributes.service.instance.id
| WHERE increase > 0
| SORT increase DESC
